mapper.select: SELECT id, question_bank_id, material_id, sequence, creator, add_datetime, operator, operation_datetime FROM question_bank_materials_mapping WHERE question_bank_id = #{questionBankId} ORDER BY sequence ASC, add_datetime ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO question_bank_materials_mapping (question_bank_id, material_id, sequence, creator, add_datetime, operator, operation_datetime) VALUES
(#{item.questionBankId}, #{item.materialId}, #{item.sequence}, #{item.creator}, #{item.addDatetime}, #{item.operator}, #{item.operationDatetime})
